basic_details.job_title: Samagra Shiksha Hisar Education Volunteer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 38 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Samagra Shiksha Hisar (DPC Samagra Shiksha Hisar)
basic_details.short_information: Samagra Shiksha Hisar (DPC Samagra Shiksha Hisar) has officially released a notification for the recruitment of 38 Education Volunteer Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for government jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can download the application form from the official website and submit it offline.

age_limit.age_details: Please refer to the official notification for Age Limit details.
age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for Age Limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: 10+2 and D.Ed. or B.Ed./Spl. B.Ed. or equivalent with minimum 50% marks and HTET/CTET pass
qualification.details: 10+2 and D.Ed. or B.Ed./Spl. B.Ed. or equivalent with minimum 50% marks and HTET/CTET pass.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DPC Samagra Shiksha Hisar Education Volunteer Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website:samagra.education.gov.in/ .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 26-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Education Volunteer posts?
faq.answer: The last date for the submission of applications for the Education Volunteer posts is 26th May 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance of the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Education Volunteer post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 38 vacancies announced for the Education Volunteer position by Samagra Shiksha Hisar.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates must have completed 10+2 and possess a D.Ed. or B.Ed./Spl. B.Ed. or equivalent qualification with a minimum of 50% marks. Additionally, passing the HTET/CTET exam is mandatory.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Education Volunteer role?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Education Volunteer post will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 10,000.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for this job?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and submit it via post or as instructed in the notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Education Volunteer posts?
faq.answer: The selection process will primarily involve Document Verification and the preparation of a Merit List based on the candidates' qualifications and other criteria.

faq.question: Q8. Where is this job located?
faq.answer: The recruitment is for Samagra Shiksha Hisar, located in Hisar, Haryana.

faq.question: Q9. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: The job type for the Education Volunteer post is contractual.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be accessed through the links provided in the 'Important Links' section of this article.
